title: Navigating the Tiger Global ruling and India’s tax landscape
description: The Supreme Court’s recent ruling in the Tiger Global case marks a significant development in India’s evolving jurisprudence on tax sovereignty and treaty abuse. The case concerns 3 investment holding companies, namely Tiger Global International II Holdings, Tiger Global International III Holdings, and Tiger Global International IV Holdings (collectively, “Tiger Global”) which are incorporated and have tax residency in Mauritius.The dispute arose in 2018 when Tiger Global’s Mauritius entities so
